seniority.level: Principal / Staff IC (equivalent to Senior Staff PM)
level_signals: 10+ years of product management experience required
Expected to 'inspire with a bold vision' and 'set the standard for product excellence'

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 10+ years of product management experience, with a proven track record of scaling membership, subscription, or loyalty programs at a significant scale.
must_haves.qualifier: with proven track record in membership/subscription/loyalty

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: with a proven track record of scaling membership, subscription, or loyalty programs at a significant scale.
The ability to see the "big picture" and understand how various financial products can be woven together to create a 1+1=3 value proposition.
Exceptional communication skills with the ability to influence C-suite stakeholders and lead through ambiguity.
An analytical mindset with the ability to model the impact of membership benefits on a variety of metrics (e.g., long-term value, acquisition costs).
A passion for building products that don't just work, but genuinely improve the financial lives of our members.

explicitly_excluded: Remote work from Hawaii or Alaska: 'Due to insurance coverage issues, we are unable to accommodate remote work from Hawaii or Alaska at this time.'

scope.surface: SoFi Plus membership and loyalty program — packaging, enrollment, retention, benefits curation across the SoFi ecosystem (Money, Invest, Credit Card, Lending)
scope.business_model: B2C premium membership / subscription (national bank, fintech)
primary_metrics_inferred: North Star Membership metrics (defined by PM)
core_responsibilities: Lead the multi-year product vision for SoFi Plus, including identifying new benefits that inspire Members to adopt and utilize Plus.
Own the end-to-end membership journey, from initial discovery and enrollment to long-term retention and 'wow' moments.
Collaborate with leaders across Money, Invest, Credit Card, and Lending to curate a unified suite of benefits that feels like a cohesive, premium ecosystem rather than a collection of offers.
Create, communicate, and socialize a high-fidelity product roadmap that aligns executive stakeholders and cross-functional teams around the future of membership.
Work closely with Design and Research to understand member needs and translate those insights into innovative solutions that solve real financial pain-points.
Oversee the documentation and processes that ensure that every launch meets our high bar for product quality and member impact.
Define the North Star metrics for Membership success; monitor performance and iterate rapidly based on data-driven insights.
Partner with Marketing, Legal, Compliance, and Finance to navigate complex regulatory landscapes while delivering a seamless, 'no-brainer' value proposition to our Members.

green_flags: Clear product ownership area — end-to-end of SoFi Plus membership program
High-visibility, high-impact role described as a 'primary driver of value' for the company
Broad cross-functional scope signals senior influence without pure people management
JD explicitly mentions real member impact as a core motivator
red_flags: Base pay range referenced ('listed below') but not actually included in the scraped JD text — compensation is unknown
Location type is ambiguous: JD implies remote is possible (Hawaii/Alaska exclusion) but no explicit hybrid/remote/onsite policy stated
No cities listed; location expectations entirely unclear
No nice-to-haves listed — requirements may be interpreted very strictly by hiring team
